waves.name: Critical Integration Wiring
waves.description: Connect existing complete engine components to UI. No new algorithms needed — pure integration work.

stories.title: Wire MosaicBuilder into MosaicEditorView
stories.description: Replace simulated startBuild() with real MosaicBuilder.buildPlan(). MainMenuView must instantiate MosaicEditorView when 'New Mosaic' selected.
acceptance: Progress bar reflects real build progress

stories.title: Connect TileCollectionView to MosaicEditorView
stories.description: Embed TileCollectionView in editor sidebar. Create shared TileCollectionManager. Wire import/remove callbacks.
acceptance: Import folder loads real tiles via TileCollectionManager

stories.title: Wire real export in PreviewView
stories.description: Replace stub alert with real MosaicExporter.export(plan:to:). Format selection from NSSavePanel.
acceptance: Output file is a real mosaic image

stories.title: Fix ColorAdjuster integration (targetColor)
stories.description: Add targetColor field to TilePlacement. Populate during MosaicBuilder.buildPlan(). Pass to MosaicExporter for real color adjustment.
acceptance: MosaicBuilder populates targetColor from source image region

waves.name: Engine Integration Gaps
waves.description: Wire remaining engine components that are fully implemented but disconnected from the build pipeline.

stories.title: Wire MetalTileScorer into MosaicBuilder
stories.description: MosaicBuilder should use MetalTileScorer when GPU is available, falling back to TileScorer (CPU).
acceptance: CPU fallback works when Metal unavailable
Build time measurably faster with GPU

stories.title: Wire TileSplitter into MosaicBuilder
stories.description: Call TileSplitter when config.splitPercentage > 0. Apply splits to MosaicPlan after initial placement.

stories.title: Wire MaskProcessor into build pipeline
stories.description: Add mask file picker to MosaicEditorView. MosaicBuilder calls MaskProcessor.applyMask() on plan.
acceptance: Mask file picker in editor UI

stories.title: Replace inline duplicate tracking with DuplicateControlEngine
stories.description: MosaicBuilder should use DuplicateControlEngine.UsageTracker, parsePriorityHashtag, and forceUnusedTiles.

stories.title: Enable TileVariant selection during build
stories.description: When allowRotation/allowFlip are true, score each variant and pick the best match.
acceptance: Variants evaluated when enabled in settings
PSDExporter and MosaicExporter apply variant transform

waves.name: UI Completion
waves.description: Complete the remaining UI views and controls.

stories.title: Build real SettingsView with all controls
stories.description: Wire SwiftUI Form to SettingsStore @Observable. Controls for every MosaicSettings field.

stories.title: Create About dialog
stories.description: SwiftUI About window with app version, build info, framework credits.

stories.title: Add Social Sharing
stories.description: NSSharingServicePicker integration for sharing exported mosaics.
acceptance: Can share to Mail, Messages, AirDrop

stories.title: Add DSLR preset mode
stories.description: Settings preset with high-res defaults for DSLR photography.

waves.name: Web Viewer Enhancement
waves.description: Upgrade the Leaflet.js web viewer to match the original's Zoomify format and plugin set.

stories.title: Implement Zoomify tile format and full plugin set
stories.description: Update WebMosaicExporter to generate Zoomify-compatible tiles. Bundle leaflet-search, fullscreen, easy-button plugins. Generate self-contained offline HTML.

stories.title: Add WKWebView in-app preview
stories.description: Embed WKWebView in PreviewView to preview generated Leaflet.js mosaics inline.
acceptance: Loads generated HTML after web export

waves.name: Resources & Polish
waves.description: Bundle resources and add remaining quality-of-life features.

stories.title: Replace toolbar icons with SF Symbols
stories.description: Use native SF Symbols throughout the app instead of bitmap toolbar icons.
acceptance: All toolbar actions use SF Symbols

stories.title: Create credits and license files
stories.description: Document all Apple framework and open-source library attributions.

stories.title: Implement UpdateChecker
stories.description: URLSession-based version check against GitHub releases API.
acceptance: Checks GitHub releases for newer version

stories.title: Add Undo/Redo for tile swaps
stories.description: SwiftUI UndoManager integration for manual tile placement changes.

waves.name: Deferred / Optional
waves.description: Items that are nice-to-have or may not apply to YJMosaic.

stories.title: Localization (String Catalogs)
stories.description: Create .xcstrings from existing .mo files. Start with en, then add key languages.

stories.title: Bundle mask templates
stories.description: Create or port 7 example mask PNGs and add to app bundle.

stories.title: Metal ColorHistogram shader
stories.description: Optional GPU-accelerated histogram for tile collection analytics.
acceptance: Collection brightness distribution computed on GPU

skipped_gaps.reason: User manual — create Help Book later or use in-app onboarding
GigaPan integration — niche feature, WebMosaicExporter provides equivalent deep-zoom
Donate button — not applicable for YJMosaic (different authorship)
